detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ARMANU._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#1783-1983):
	External calls:
	- _transfer(from,burnAddress,burnAmount) (ARMANU.sol#1815)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,_fundingWallet,block.timestamp) (ARMANU.sol#2025-2039)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ARMANU.sol#2001-2013)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _transfer(from,burnAddress,burnAmount) (ARMANU.sol#1815)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,_fundingWallet,block.timestamp) (ARMANU.sol#2025-2039)
		- address(_fundingWallet).transfer(ethForFunding) (ARMANU.sol#2097)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _swapping = true (ARMANU.sol#1921)
	ARMANU._swapping (ARMANU.sol#1561) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ARMANU._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#1783-1983)

detectors.description:

		- address(_fundingWallet).transfer(ethForFunding) (ARMANU.sol#2097)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super._transfer(from,address(this),fees) (ARMANU.sol#1969)
		- _b[from] = fromBalance - amount (ARMANU.sol#381)
		- _b[to] += amount (ARMANU.sol#385)
	ERC20._b (ARMANU.sol#127) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#399-419)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#349-395)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (ARMANU.sol#187-203)

		- _b[from] = fromBalance - amount (ARMANU.sol#381)
		- _b[to] += amount (ARMANU.sol#385)
	ERC20._b (ARMANU.sol#127) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#399-419)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#349-395)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (ARMANU.sol#187-203)
	- _swapping = false (ARMANU.sol#1925)
	ARMANU._swapping (ARMANU.sol#1561) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ARMANU._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#1783-1983)
	- swapBack() (ARMANU.sol#1923)
		- _tokensForFunding = 0 (ARMANU.sol#2091)
	ARMANU._tokensForFunding (ARMANU.sol#1587) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ARMANU._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#1783-1983)
	- ARMANU.swapBack() (ARMANU.sol#2045-2107)
	- _tokensForFunding += (fees * _fundingFee) / totalFees (ARMANU.sol#1963)
	ARMANU._tokensForFunding (ARMANU.sol#1587) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ARMANU._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#1783-1983)
	- ARMANU.swapBack() (ARMANU.sol#2045-2107)
	- swapBack() (ARMANU.sol#1923)
		- _tokensForLiquidity = 0 (ARMANU.sol#2093)
	ARMANU._tokensForLiquidity (ARMANU.sol#1589) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ARMANU._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#1783-1983)
	- ARMANU.swapBack() (ARMANU.sol#2045-2107)
	- _tokensForLiquidity += (fees * _liquidityFee) / totalFees (ARMANU.sol#1961)
	ARMANU._tokensForLiquidity (ARMANU.sol#1589) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ARMANU._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ARMANU.sol#1783-1983)
	- ARMANU.swapBack() (ARMANU.sol#2045-2107)
